title: weihea ceylanica
intro: Weihea ceylanica, also known as the 'Ceylonese Weihea', is a plant species native to Sri Lanka, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Weihea ceylanica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems. Weihea ceylanica is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
